data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Conditional visibility (show only if X is true)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case discusses various custom fields but does not explicitly demonstrate how conditional visibility is implemented or validated. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the existence or functionality of conditional visibility in the system.
gaps: No evidence provided for the implementation of conditional visibility based on specific conditions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define conditional visibility behavior
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that fields are displayed based on specific conditions being true.
